GlobalConfig.title: GlobalConfig
GlobalConfig.description: Global website configurations, logos, general cohort background portraits, documentation gallery, and honors list

logoSekolah.description: Base64 encoded string or URL of the school logo

logoAngkatan.description: Base64 encoded string or URL of the cohort/generation logo

generationBg.description: Base64 encoded string or URL of the interactive landing page banner

generationPortrait.description: Base64 or URL of the generation portrait image

generationHero.description: Contains title, subtitle, and description texts for the home hero section

generationDocs.description: List of system photo documentation records

generationAchievements.description: List of custom achievements of the generation

ClassConfig.title: ClassConfig
ClassConfig.description: Custom parameters, lists of achievements, dynamic structure and pupil catalogs of an individual classroom

id.description: Display code for this classroom, e.g. X.1

logo.description: Base64 encoded string of class emblem

bg.description: Base64 encoded string of class hero cover image

tagline.description: Text tagline or code representation of the class

slogan.description: Descriptive greeting slogan written by class officers

structure.description: Dynamic key-value pairs mapping roles (wali, ketua, wakil, dst) to information and photos

members.description: List of interactive student members records

achievements.description: List of honors, stellar awards and credentials of the class

photos.description: Gallery photographs collection of class moments

isAvailable.description: Flag indicating if the class page is actively browseable

/config/{configId}.description: Holds general configuration states including the central logos and home details

/classes/{classId}.description: Details of structure, photos, slogans, and members assigned to a particular class
